# DOWNLOAD OUR FREE APP

Upgrade your experience with our new and improved app! Now Featuring Apple Pay and Google Pay, making checkout faster, easier, and more secure. Download today and enjoy seamless payments at your fingertips

[![apple-app-store](https://allnightcars.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/10/apple-app-store.png)](https://itunes.apple.com/gb/app/all-night-cars/id709088117?mt=8)[![google-play](https://allnightcars.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/10/google-play.png)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.autocab.taxibooker.allnightcars.dartford)

![](https://allnightcars.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/50-Years-in-Business-Banner.png)

## Over 50 years serving the people of Dartford and beyond

For a half of century All Night Cars Serving the people of Dartford, Crayford, Bexleyheath, Swanley, Greenhithe, Bean, Northfleet, Gravesend, Bluewater, Longfield, Crossways and beyond we are Dartford’s largest and most reliable Private Hire Operator.

[01322 221100](tel:01322221100)

## Book Online

Looking to book your private hire in advance? Use our online booking form

[Book now](https://allnightcars.co.uk/book-online/)

## Airport Transfer

Book your Airport Transfers with us. We travel to several major and regional airports.

[Book now](https://allnightcars.co.uk/airport-transfers/)

## SIGN UP FOR A BUSINESS ACCOUNT

- Monthly Invoicing
- Easy to keep track of company expenditure
- Useful for staff

[Find out more](https://allnightcars.co.uk/open-a-business-account/)

### 5 star service

Extremely reliable! I need early morning and late (like 3am) pick ups as I work on trains in Euston. At times I have needed a cab short notice due to engineering works and they have always xome through. Drivers are polite and cars very clean. Feel very safe even in dead of night.

**-Tess T**

This is the only private hire firm in Dartford, which has never let me down on a pick up time. Would recommend them, good value too.

**-Nicky F**

Used All Night Cars they arrived on time. Driver was very polite. All Nights App is easy to use. Clean vehicle, good service. Would highly recommend and definitely use again. Keep up the good work All Night Cars.

**-Suki K**

Used All Night Cars recently for an airport run (Dartford – Gatwick & return); could not fault them at all! Friendly staff on phone; cab arrived a few minutes early; very polite driver; car immaculately clean; very good driving. Shall always use this firm when I need a cab!

**-J Kirk**

First time ever used a cab for the airport instead of airport parking. Very impressed, spot on time – even on our return with a delayed flight. The driver, Mohammed, kept us informed that he was waiting for us and didn’t ask for a penny extra. Very polite and presentable driver, lovely car. Excellent service!!

**-Bridget A**

Extremely reliable! I need early morning and late (like 3am) pick ups as I work on trains in Euston. At times I have needed a cab short notice due to engineering works and they have always xome through. Drivers are polite and cars very clean. Feel very safe even in dead of night.

**-Tess T**

This is the only private hire firm in Dartford, which has never let me down on a pick up time. Would recommend them, good value too.

**-Nicky F**

Used All Night Cars they arrived on time. Driver was very polite. All Nights App is easy to use. Clean vehicle, good service. Would highly recommend and definitely use again. Keep up the good work All Night Cars.

**-Suki K**

Used All Night Cars recently for an airport run (Dartford – Gatwick & return); could not fault them at all! Friendly staff on phone; cab arrived a few minutes early; very polite driver; car immaculately clean; very good driving. Shall always use this firm when I need a cab!

**-J Kirk**
